issues.title: Archived/shipped releases display inconsistently in sidebar and detail (Published vs Completed vs blank)

description: UI consistency: collapse 'Published' (GitHub-only) and 'Shipped' (Tiki) labels to a single 'Completed' display state across the sidebar badge and detail panels. Restores the Completed badge on archived releases (v0.2.16-v0.2.18) without undoing #142.
